title: SliceOn Delight
description: This mod allows you to cut different foods and cook new ones from them.
body:
SliceOn Delight
A tasty add-on for Farmer’s Delight!


Description:
SliceOn Delight expands your Farmer’s Delight experience by adding the ability to slice various types of food! Use new cutting recipes to process, fruits, vegetables, and more — making food preparation even more immersive and fun. 

Features:

New cutting recipes for vanilla and Farmer’s Delight ingredients

Additional food items to craft and cook


Whether you’re a chef, farmer, or just hungry for more, SliceOn Delight makes your culinary adventures more delicious than ever!

Dependencies:

Requires [farmers delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
